acceptance: numeric max|r|<tol on ORIGINAL factors only; aux factors join the least-squares but never acceptance
headline: ceiling (any derived construction) and held-out selected construction vs enumeration-budget-matched restart at equal solver calls

seed_hygiene.streams: selection=seed, second=seed+SALT, grading/e2e=seed+3*SALT; held-out selection splits the grading pool by seed parity, so the construction chooser and its evaluation never share a failure instance

verdict: POSITIVE external anchor: 2 of 4 real-system classes (['trilat_far', 'conic_ghost']) produce a >=20% two-stream failure population that derived constructions clear at a rate the enumeration-budget-matched restart control cannot (McNemar p<0.05). Documented negatives (no failure population): ['ik3r_random', 'circles_far'].
